allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking supports blooms-taxonomy by turning higher-stage synthesis into a coherent view of interrelationships rather than a pile of disconnected parts.
allies.source_quote: Bloom's highest level, Create (Synthesis), is deeply intertwined with Systems Thinking.

allies.rationale_text: Feynman-technique helps blooms-taxonomy test whether lower stages are solid enough before the learner attempts more complex analytical or evaluative work.
allies.source_quote: This technique acts as a practical method to test the integrity of the lower cognitive levels.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines blooms-taxonomy by distorting the impartial analysis and evaluation needed before strong judgment or synthesis can be trusted.
antagonists.source_quote: Confirmation Bias/False Pattern Recognition skews the impartiality required for Analyze and compromises the objectivity of Evaluate.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Blooms-taxonomy conflicts with decomposition when rigid level-by-level progression prevents parallel exploration of higher-order insights that emerge before lower levels are complete.
structured_tensions.source_quote: blooms-taxonomy conflicts with decomposition (decomposition) when rigid level-by-level progression prevents parallel exploration of higher-order insights that emerge before lower levels are complete.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Blooms-taxonomy conflicts with first-principles-thinking when adherence to a predefined cognitive hierarchy substitutes for direct engagement with foundational assumptions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: blooms-taxonomy conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when adherence to a predefined cognitive hierarchy substitutes for direct engagement with foundational assumptions.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on stage-testing through feynman-technique and on systems-aware synthesis, with one clear analysis-and-evaluation antagonist.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader MECE or curriculum relation sprawl beyond the cleanest current-vocabulary links.
open_questions: Cognitive-load-theory is source-real as a boundary condition, but the first-order surface is cleaner with systems-thinking and feynman-technique.
